name: Ya Gotta Empanada
recipeIngredient: 1 package Spanish rice mix (4.4 to 6.8 oz.)
1 can Chunk breast of chicken (6-3/4 oz) drained, flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rice, chicken, cheese, onions, and olives.
2. Spoon half of the rice mixture onto half of each pie crust.
3. Fold the crust over the filling.
4. Seal and crimp the edges to form the empanadas.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 22 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Cut each empanada in half.
